prompt: Keep the EXACT same production lobby-preview art style as this Stage 3 reference: polished painted 2D, soft oval ground shadows, same collage framing and enemy scale, no UI text. REPLACE the frost theme completely. Floor = VX WILDS: green grassy cracked stone tiles with grass tufts (NOT ice). REPLACE every enemy with ONLY these 6 in-game enemy designs: (1) translucent lime-green slime blob with a dark green skull visible inside and glowing green eye sockets, (2) small brown ground beetle/bug, (3) orange-yellow and black striped wasp with translucent wings and large black eyes, (4) black bat with glowing yellow eyes, (5) orange carved jack-o-lantern pumpkin, (6) coral/pink horizontally-banded jellyfish dome with four thick tentacles and NO face. No plants, no hands, no eye orbs, no frost glow, no ice. Clean vignette edges.
